_provenance: Synthetic scenario for daemon restart mid-day. Derived from AC-M1F.2.4 (resume_shadow_baselines runs AFTER wipe_transient_state), AC-M1F.7.2 (table is canonical source of truth on restart). Rows represent what the DB contains at restart time.
_scenario: Daemon restarted mid-day. DB has existing shadow_history rows for today. resume_shadow_baselines must read latest row per symphony for today's trading_day AFTER wipe_transient_state wipes in-memory state.

resume_order_constraint.comment: PA-M1F-2: resume_shadow_baselines MUST run after wipe_transient_state. Inverted order would overwrite today's wiped state with yesterday's rows.

SYM_ALPHA.comment: AC-M1F.7.2: table wins on divergence with in-memory cache
